symptoms.symptom_name: Painless bilateral white lacy (reticular) streaks on buccal mucosa

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bilateral symmetric painless white lacy striae (Wickham striae) are the classic reticular pattern.
Malignant lesions are typically unilateral, indurated, non-homogeneous — not bilateral symmetric lace.

symptoms.symptom_name: White lesions do not wipe or scrape off

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Candidal pseudomembranes characteristically rub off leaving an erythematous base; non-wiping favours a keratotic lesion.
Lichen planus striae are part of the mucosal surface and do not wipe away.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral symmetric distribution, chronic / long-standing before discovery

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Symmetry and chronicity are typical of lichen planus and atypical of an acute or malignant process.
An acute allergic process would not present as symmetric chronic keratotic striae.

symptoms.symptom_name: Palpitations, tachypnoea and catastrophic health cognition (autonomic arousal)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sudden sympathetic arousal following a frightening discovery is the core of a panic reaction.

symptoms.symptom_name: Subjective throat tightness with preserved swallow and speech (globus-type)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Globus and throat tightness with intact swallow/speech are common somatic features of anxiety.
True airway compromise impairs swallowing and phonation and is accompanied by objective swelling/stridor.

symptoms.symptom_name: No lip/tongue/facial swelling, no urticaria, no stridor

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of objective swelling, urticaria and stridor excludes anaphylaxis/angioedema as the cause of the throat sensation.

symptoms.symptom_name: No pain, ulceration, bleeding, induration, lumps or weight loss

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of induration, ulceration, bleeding, neck mass and weight loss lowers malignancy concern — but does not replace in-person examination.
Erosive/atrophic disease is painful and eroded; its absence indicates the low-risk reticular form.

symptoms.symptom_name: Oropharyngeal examination — intact non-indurated mucosa, no ulceration/erythematous borders, normal tonsils, midline uvula, no cervical lymphadenopathy, patent airway

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: In-person clinician examination confirming benign reticular features and a patent airway — sealed clinician measurement the AI Doctor cannot obtain and must arrange in person.
Direct inspection/palpation for induration and lesion character is what actually excludes malignancy — hence mandatory in-person confirmation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Vital signs (BP 145/88, HR 110, RR 22, SpO2 100%, temp 36.8 C)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sinus tachycardia, mild tachypnoea and mildly raised BP with normal SpO2 and temperature are consistent with autonomic arousal, not hypoxia or infection — clinician-measured, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Incisional/punch biopsy histopathology of the oral lesion

investigation_details.expected_result: Band-like lymphocytic infiltrate with basal cell degeneration if lichen planus; not required for classic asymptomatic reticular disease
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: None for classic reticular disease; biopsy is reserved for atypical, erosive, or non-healing lesions

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Histology is definitive but not indicated for classic asymptomatic reticular lesions — ordering it here would be over-investigation.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Painless, bilateral, symmetric, non-wiping, chronic, non-ulcerated white striae together strongly favour benign reticular lichen planus over candidiasis or malignancy.
Palpitations, tachypnoea and globus-type throat tightness with preserved swallow/speech and NO objective swelling or stridor identify an anxiety-driven presentation and exclude airway obstruction.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person oral examination by GP or dentist
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Direct inspection confirms the benign reticular pattern and is what actually excludes an indurated/malignant lesion; the definitive step the AI Doctor cannot perform over chat.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Baseline clinical photography of the lesion
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Documents the lesion for periodic monitoring at the in-person review.
Not indicated for a classic asymptomatic reticular lesion; reserved for atypical, erosive, indurated or non-healing lesions — ordering it now is over-investigation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Empiric blood tests / imaging / allergy work-up
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: No clinical indication; there is no infection, systemic illness or allergic reaction to investigate — over-testing feeds the health anxiety.
